title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 24 2022

summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 24/05/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends by 3.54%, the main contract closed 830.5. the quotation in the morning was decreased by 5-10yuan/mt over yesterday. And decreased 20-30 yuan/ mt in the afternoon.
